name: gitwarp
description: Worktree isolation and CLI logistics for concurrent coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Git worktree isolation for concurrent agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp to scan, summon, label, and collapse isolated git worktree sandboxes while preventing branch collisions across automated coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Set up an isolated workspace for this agent task.
Scan active GitWarp worktrees before starting parallel work.
